hooks.command: cd /Users/junho/Desktop/proism-ai && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -5 && echo 'Stop check: TypeScript OK' || echo 'Stop check: TYPE ERROR - 수정 필요'

mkdir -p /Users/junho/Desktop/proism-ai/.claude/backups && echo "Compact at $(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" > /Users/junho/Desktop/proism-ai/.claude/backups/compact-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log && echo 'PreCompact: backup marker saved'
cd /Users/junho/Desktop/proism-ai && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'POST-COMMIT CHECK: 타입 에러 발견!'; exit 1; fi; echo 'Post-commit: TypeScript OK'
